regions.text: The most important number today is zero (0). It is about a thousand years old, but no one knows who invented it.
Zeroes change numbers: one zero makes a number ten times larger, two zeroes a hundred times, and six zeroes make a million.
Schools teach addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. 5+5=10, 5-5=0, 5x5=25, 5÷5=1.
FUTURE: will add, subtract, multiply. PRESENT: add(s), subtract(s), multiply(ies). PAST: added, subtracted, multiplied.
